_comment: Species: Qilin (麒麟) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Qilin

canonical.appearance: Chimeric beast 5 m long, body of deer scaled in jade, tail of ox, single horn of crystal, hooves of fire
canonical.size: 5 m adult, 8000 jin; ancient 15 m, 100000 jin
canonical.behavior: Auspicious beast; appears at the birth of great cultivators; avoids the wicked; cultivates by walking auspicious paths
canonical.habitat: Auspicious spirit veins, Qilin City region, continent hearts
canonical.relationships: Bonded to Qilin City imperial lineage; auspicious to all cultivators
canonical.bloodline: True Auspicious lineage; one of the four auspicious beasts
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: qilin — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
